def positive_star_import_used_in_non_init_production_module():
    rule_id = "star_import_used_in_non_init_production_module"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Star import (from x import *) used in a production module other than __init__.py."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
